summary: Frontend test suite for FR-PERS-001 (Save Model to Browser Storage) is complete. All 5 test IDs implemented: T-FE-PERS-001-01 (unit: serialization), T-FE-PERS-001-02 (integration: 500ms perf), T-FE-PERS-001-03 (behavioral: Save button notification), T-FE-PERS-001-04 (unit: QuotaExceededError), T-E2E-HAPPY-001-01 (E2E: happy path). PR #57 opened on branch feature/13-save-model-persistence-test. Tests define TDD contracts for ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and persistenceService.ts implementation.

artifacts.name: persistenceService.test.ts
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-01: saveModel serializes all brick fields with schema version 1.0.0

artifacts.name: persistenceService.performance.test.ts
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-02: save completes within 500ms for 1,000 bricks

artifacts.name: SaveModel.behavioral.test.tsx
artifacts.description: T-FE-PERS-001-03: clicking Save shows success notification

recommended_actions: Read all test files to understand implementation contracts before coding
Implement ActionBar.tsx: Save button (data-testid='btn-save'), async saveModel call, QuotaExceededError handling, auto-dismiss notification after 3s
Implement Notification.tsx: reads notification from store, renders with role='status' aria-live='polite', uses .includes('error') for error detection
Verify persistenceService.ts saveModel is complete with PersistedModel interface and schema version 1.0.0
Verify Zustand store has notification: string | null and setNotification action
Run vitest run to confirm all unit/integration tests pass before opening implementation PR
